text.title: Figma Comment Triage Protocol Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs to procedure to output for a typical instance of Figma Comment Triage Protocol.

example.scenario: Daily 30-min sweep on the billing-portal Figma file: 22 open comments → 9 FIX (linked to JIRA), 4 DECIDE (logged into design-decision-log rows 097-100), 6 ANSWER (replied), 3 IGNORE (plugin noise). Queue depth drops from 22 to 0 by EOD.
example.trace: r1-closed-taxonomy → r2-named-owner-per-row → r3-sla-per-category → r4-route-decide-to-log → sweep stored
